standard.overall: A medium-to-large, naturally occurring bobtailed cat with a wild appearance.
standard.head: Broad modified wedge with a distinct brow above large, expressive eyes.
standard.eyes: Large, almond-shaped, set at a slight slant.
standard.ears: Medium-large, wide at base, tufted tips preferred.
standard.body: Sturdy and muscular with a substantial bone structure. Noticeable rectangular shape.
standard.tail: Short, flexible and expressive. May be straight, kinked or curled.
standard.coat: Medium-long, shaggy, and resilient. Also shorthair variety.

standard.overall: A sturdy, French breed known for its blue coat and 'smiling' expression.
standard.head: Broad and round, not a sphere. Powerful jaw and full cheeks.
standard.eyes: Round, large, and expressive. Colors range from copper to gold.
standard.ears: Medium height, set high on the head.
standard.body: Robust, muscular, and medium-long. Often called a 'potato on toothpicks'.
standard.coat: Medium-short, dense, water-repellent, slightly woolly texture.
representative_colors: Blue (Any shade from ash to slate)

standard.overall: A rich, chocolate-brown cat with a unique head shape and green eyes.
standard.head: Longer than wide, with a distinct 'stop' at the eyes and a squared muzzle.
standard.ears: Large, round-tipped, tilted forward, giving an alert look.
standard.coat: Short to medium length, smooth, lustrous and close-lying.

standard.overall: An elegant, medium-sized cat with a unique 'pom-pom' tail.
standard.head: Equilateral triangle, long clean lines, high cheekbones.
standard.eyes: Large, oval, set at a pronounced slant.
standard.ears: Large, upright, set wide apart but at right angles to the head.
standard.body: Long, slender, but well-muscled. Elegant silhouette.
standard.tail: Short, maximum 3 inches, composed of one or more curves or angles.
standard.coat: Soft and silky. Shorthair or Longhair (with ruff and breeches).

standard.overall: A silver-blue cat from Thailand with a heart-shaped face.
standard.head: Heart-shaped when viewed from the front. Large flat forehead.
standard.eyes: Luminous, oversized, and green. Large and prominent.
standard.ears: Large, with rounded tips, set high on the head.
standard.body: Semi-cobby, muscular, supple and heavy for its size.
standard.coat: Single coat, short, glossy and close-lying. Silver-tipped.
standard.personality: Sensitive, intelligent, and very attached to home.

standard.overall: A tailless cat with a rounded appearance and powerful hind legs.
standard.head: Round with a medium-short muzzle and prominent whisker pads.
standard.eyes: Large, round, set at a slight angle.
standard.ears: Medium-sized, wide at base, tapering to rounded tips.
standard.body: Sturdy, compact, with a short back and deep flanks.
standard.tail: Ideally tailless (Rumpy). Also stumpy or longy varieties exist.
standard.coat: Double coat, short and dense with a padded feel. Also Longhair (Cymric).

standard.overall: A large, spotted cat that looks wild but has a gentle temperament.
standard.head: Modified wedge with a suggestion of squareness in the muzzle.
standard.ears: Large, alert, set at a 45-degree angle.
standard.body: Solid, hard, athletic and muscular. Surprisingly heavy.
standard.coat: Short, smooth, satiny texture with a lustrous sheen.

standard.overall: The 'Cat in Sheep's Clothing', known for its thick, curly coat.
standard.head: Round, broad, and full-cheeked. Short, squared-off muzzle.
standard.ears: Medium size, broad at base, pointed tips.
standard.body: Medium to large, rectangular and muscular. Sturdy bone.
standard.coat: Soft, plush, full and obviously curly. Shorthair or Longhair.

standard.overall: A long-haired Abyssinian with a fox-like appearance.
standard.head: Modified wedge with rounded contours. Large ears.
standard.eyes: Almond-shaped, large, brilliant. Dark rim around eyes.
standard.ears: Large, alert, moderately pointed, tufted preferred.
standard.coat: Fine, very soft, double coat. Extremely bushy 'fox' tail.

standard.overall: An elegant, finely-boned cat with a silky, flowing coat.
standard.head: Small to medium, tapering wedge. Long, straight nose profile.
standard.ears: Large, wide at base, pointed and tufted. Set high.
standard.body: Medium-sized, slender, graceful and lithe. Long torso.
standard.coat: Single coat, long, silky, with a fine luster. Plumed tail.
